words.example_sentence: Java is a strongly typed language that runs on many platforms.
words.example_sentence_cn: Java 是一种可以在多种平台上运行的强类型语言。

words.example_sentence: Install a JDK before compiling Java source code.
words.example_sentence_cn: 编译 Java 源代码前需要先安装 JDK。
words.code_snippet: // JDK includes javac and other development tools

words.example_sentence: The JRE provides the libraries needed to run Java applications.
words.example_sentence_cn: JRE 提供运行 Java 应用所需的类库。

words.example_sentence: The JVM executes Java bytecode.
words.example_sentence_cn: JVM 负责执行 Java 字节码。

words.example_sentence: The Java compiler converts source code into bytecode.
words.example_sentence_cn: Java 编译器会把源代码转换成字节码。

words.example_sentence: A Java source file normally ends with the .java extension.
words.example_sentence_cn: Java 源文件通常以 .java 作为扩展名。

words.example_sentence: The compiler reports syntax and type errors.
words.example_sentence_cn: 编译器会报告语法错误和类型错误。

words.example_sentence: Use javac to compile a Java source file.
words.example_sentence_cn: 使用 javac 编译 Java 源文件。

words.example_sentence: The classpath tells Java where to find classes and libraries.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类路径告诉 Java 去哪里查找类和依赖库。

words.example_sentence: A JAR file packages compiled classes and resources.
words.example_sentence_cn: JAR 文件用于打包编译后的类和资源。

words.example_sentence: The main method is the entry point of a Java application.
words.example_sentence_cn: main 方法是 Java 应用程序的入口。

words.example_sentence: The JVM calls the main method when the program starts.
words.example_sentence_cn: 程序启动时 JVM 会调用 main 方法。

words.example_sentence: Java has eight primitive types.
words.example_sentence_cn: Java 有八种基本数据类型。
words.code_snippet: int count = 10;  // int is a primitive type

words.example_sentence: A byte stores an eight-bit signed integer.
words.example_sentence_cn: byte 用于存储 8 位有符号整数。

words.example_sentence: A short uses sixteen bits of storage.
words.example_sentence_cn: short 使用 16 位存储空间。

words.example_sentence: Use long when an integer may exceed the range of int.
words.example_sentence_cn: 整数可能超过 int 范围时使用 long。

words.example_sentence: A float literal usually ends with the letter f.
words.example_sentence_cn: float 字面量通常以字母 f 结尾。

words.example_sentence: Double is Java's default type for decimal literals.
words.example_sentence_cn: double 是 Java 小数字面量的默认类型。

words.example_sentence: A char stores one UTF-16 code unit.
words.example_sentence_cn: char 用于存储一个 UTF-16 代码单元。

words.example_sentence: A wrapper class represents a primitive value as an object.
words.example_sentence_cn: 包装类把基本类型的值表示为对象。

words.example_sentence: Autoboxing converts a primitive value into its wrapper object.
words.example_sentence_cn: 自动装箱会把基本类型值转换为包装类对象。

words.example_sentence: Unboxing converts a wrapper object back to a primitive value.
words.example_sentence_cn: 自动拆箱会把包装类对象转换回基本类型值。
words.code_snippet:
Integer boxed = 42;
int value = boxed;  // unboxing

words.example_sentence: A constructor initializes a new object.
words.example_sentence_cn: 构造方法用于初始化新对象。

words.example_sentence: An interface defines a contract that classes can implement.
words.example_sentence_cn: 接口定义类可以实现的行为约定。

words.example_sentence: An abstract class cannot be instantiated directly.
words.example_sentence_cn: 抽象类不能被直接实例化。

words.example_sentence: Encapsulation hides internal state behind methods.
words.example_sentence_cn: 封装通过方法隐藏对象的内部状态。

words.example_sentence: Polymorphism lets one interface represent different implementations.
words.example_sentence_cn: 多态让同一接口可以表示不同实现。

words.example_sentence: Method overloading uses the same method name with different parameters.
words.example_sentence_cn: 方法重载使用相同方法名和不同参数列表。
words.code_snippet:
int add(int a, int b) { return a + b; }
double add(double a, double b) { return a + b; }

words.example_sentence: Method overriding replaces inherited behavior in a subclass.
words.example_sentence_cn: 方法重写让子类替换继承的方法行为。

words.example_sentence: An access modifier controls where a member can be used.
words.example_sentence_cn: 访问修饰符控制成员可以在哪里被使用。

words.example_sentence: A public member can be accessed from any package.
words.example_sentence_cn: public 成员可以从任何包中访问。

words.example_sentence: A private member is accessible only inside its declaring class.
words.example_sentence_cn: private 成员只能在声明它的类内部访问。

words.example_sentence: A protected member is available to subclasses and classes in the same package.
words.example_sentence_cn: protected 成员可被子类和同包中的类访问。

words.example_sentence: A package groups related Java classes.
words.example_sentence_cn: 包用于组织相关的 Java 类。

words.example_sentence: A class uses extends to inherit from another class.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类使用 extends 继承另一个类。

words.example_sentence: A class uses implements to fulfill an interface contract.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类使用 implements 来实现接口约定。

words.example_sentence: The final keyword prevents reassignment, overriding, or inheritance depending on context.
words.example_sentence_cn: final 会根据使用位置阻止重新赋值、重写或继承。

words.example_sentence: The this keyword refers to the current object.
words.example_sentence_cn: this 关键字指向当前对象。

words.example_sentence: The super keyword accesses members of the parent class.
words.example_sentence_cn: super 关键字用于访问父类成员。

words.example_sentence: An enum defines a fixed set of named constants.
words.example_sentence_cn: 枚举用于定义一组固定的命名常量。

words.example_sentence: An annotation adds metadata to Java code.
words.example_sentence_cn: 注解为 Java 代码添加元数据。

words.example_sentence: A generic type works safely with different data types.
words.example_sentence_cn: 泛型类型可以安全地处理不同数据类型。

words.example_sentence: A type parameter is a placeholder for a concrete type.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类型参数是具体类型的占位符。

words.example_sentence: The diamond operator lets the compiler infer generic type arguments.
words.example_sentence_cn: 菱形操作符让编译器推断泛型参数。

words.example_sentence: ArrayList provides fast indexed access to elements.
words.example_sentence_cn: ArrayList 提供快速的按索引访问。

words.example_sentence: LinkedList implements both List and Deque.
words.example_sentence_cn: LinkedList 同时实现了 List 和 Deque 接口。

words.example_sentence: HashMap stores key-value pairs without preserving order.
words.example_sentence_cn: HashMap 存储键值对，但不保证顺序。

words.example_sentence: HashSet stores unique values with no guaranteed order.
words.example_sentence_cn: HashSet 存储不重复的值，但不保证顺序。

words.example_sentence: TreeMap keeps keys in sorted order.
words.example_sentence_cn: TreeMap 会让键保持排序状态。

words.example_sentence: TreeSet stores unique elements in sorted order.
words.example_sentence_cn: TreeSet 按排序顺序存储不重复元素。

words.example_sentence: An Iterator visits collection elements one at a time.
words.example_sentence_cn: Iterator 用于逐个访问集合元素。

words.example_sentence: An Iterable object can be used in an enhanced for loop.
words.example_sentence_cn: 实现 Iterable 的对象可以用于增强 for 循环。

words.example_sentence: Comparable defines the natural order of a type.
words.example_sentence_cn: Comparable 用于定义类型的自然排序。

words.example_sentence: A Comparator defines an external sorting rule.
words.example_sentence_cn: Comparator 用于定义外部排序规则。

words.example_sentence: A try-catch block handles exceptions from risky code.
words.example_sentence_cn: try-catch 代码块用于处理可能出现的异常。

words.example_sentence: A finally block normally runs whether an exception occurs or not.
words.example_sentence_cn: 无论是否发生异常，finally 代码块通常都会执行。

words.example_sentence: Use throw to create and raise an exception explicitly.
words.example_sentence_cn: 使用 throw 可以主动创建并抛出异常。

words.example_sentence: The throws clause declares exceptions a method may pass to its caller.
words.example_sentence_cn: throws 子句声明方法可能交给调用者处理的异常。
words.code_snippet: String load() throws IOException { return read(); }

words.example_sentence: A checked exception must be caught or declared.
words.example_sentence_cn: 受检异常必须被捕获或在方法上声明。
words.code_snippet: void load() throws IOException { }  // checked exception

words.example_sentence: An unchecked exception is a RuntimeException or one of its subclasses.
words.example_sentence_cn: 非受检异常是 RuntimeException 或它的子类。

words.example_sentence: Try-with-resources closes AutoCloseable resources automatically.
words.example_sentence_cn: try-with-resources 会自动关闭 AutoCloseable 资源。

words.example_sentence: StringBuilder efficiently builds a string through repeated changes.
words.example_sentence_cn: StringBuilder 适合通过多次修改高效构建字符串。

words.chinese: 线程安全字符串缓冲区
words.example_sentence: StringBuffer is a synchronized mutable string class.
words.example_sentence_cn: StringBuffer 是支持同步的可变字符串类。

words.example_sentence: The string pool reuses matching string literals.
words.example_sentence_cn: 字符串常量池会复用内容相同的字符串字面量。
words.code_snippet:
String first = "java";
String second = "java";  // string pool

words.example_sentence: The equals method compares logical object equality.
words.example_sentence_cn: equals 方法用于比较对象在逻辑上是否相等。

words.example_sentence: Equal objects must return the same value from the hashCode method.
words.example_sentence_cn: 相等对象的 hashCode 返回值必须相同。

words.example_sentence: An immutable object's state cannot change after construction.
words.example_sentence_cn: 不可变对象在构造完成后状态不能改变。

words.example_sentence: A lambda expression provides a compact function-like value.
words.example_sentence_cn: Lambda 表达式提供一种紧凑的函数式写法。

words.example_sentence: A functional interface has one abstract method.
words.example_sentence_cn: 函数式接口只有一个抽象方法。

words.example_sentence: A method reference is a shorter form of some lambda expressions.
words.example_sentence_cn: 方法引用是某些 Lambda 表达式的简写形式。

words.example_sentence: The Stream API processes collections through a pipeline of operations.
words.example_sentence_cn: Stream API 通过操作流水线处理集合数据。

words.example_sentence: Optional represents a value that may be present or absent.
words.example_sentence_cn: Optional 表示一个可能存在也可能不存在的值。

words.example_sentence: A Runnable represents a task that returns no result.
words.example_sentence_cn: Runnable 表示一个不返回结果的任务。

words.chinese: 可返回结果的任务接口
words.example_sentence: A Callable task can return a value and throw an exception.
words.example_sentence_cn: Callable 任务可以返回值并抛出异常。

words.example_sentence: The synchronized keyword protects a critical section with a monitor lock.
words.example_sentence_cn: synchronized 使用监视器锁保护临界区。

words.example_sentence: The volatile keyword makes writes visible to other threads.
words.example_sentence_cn: volatile 让一个线程的写入对其他线程可见。

words.example_sentence: A thread pool reuses worker threads for many tasks.
words.example_sentence_cn: 线程池会复用工作线程来执行多个任务。

words.example_sentence: ExecutorService manages task submission and worker threads.
words.example_sentence_cn: ExecutorService 管理任务提交和工作线程。

words.example_sentence: CompletableFuture composes asynchronous operations without blocking each step.
words.example_sentence_cn: CompletableFuture 可以组合异步操作，而不必在每一步阻塞等待。

words.example_sentence: A deadlock occurs when threads wait forever for each other's locks.
words.example_sentence_cn: 多个线程永久等待彼此持有的锁时就会发生死锁。
words.code_snippet: // consistent lock ordering helps prevent deadlock

words.example_sentence: A race condition makes a result depend on thread timing.
words.example_sentence_cn: 竞态条件会让结果取决于线程执行时序。
words.code_snippet: count++;  // unsafe shared update may cause a race condition

words.example_sentence: The garbage collector reclaims memory from unreachable objects.
words.example_sentence_cn: 垃圾回收器会回收不可达对象占用的内存。
words.code_snippet: object = null;  // object may later be reclaimed by the garbage collector

words.example_sentence: A class loader loads class definitions into the JVM.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类加载器把类定义加载到 JVM 中。

words.example_sentence: The JIT compiler turns frequently executed bytecode into native machine code.
words.example_sentence_cn: JIT 编译器会把频繁执行的字节码转换为本地机器码。
words.code_snippet: // JIT compiler optimizes hot methods at runtime

words.example_sentence: Objects are generally allocated in heap memory.
words.example_sentence_cn: 对象通常分配在堆内存中。
words.code_snippet: User user = new User();  // object lives in heap memory

words.example_sentence: Each thread uses stack memory for method frames and local variables.
words.example_sentence_cn: 每个线程使用栈内存保存方法栈帧和局部变量。
words.code_snippet: int total = 0;  // local variable is stored in a stack frame

words.example_sentence: Maven builds Java projects from a declarative project model.
words.example_sentence_cn: Maven 根据声明式项目模型构建 Java 项目。

words.example_sentence: Gradle uses build scripts to automate compilation and testing.
words.example_sentence_cn: Gradle 使用构建脚本自动完成编译和测试。

words.example_sentence: JUnit provides annotations and assertions for Java tests.
words.example_sentence_cn: JUnit 为 Java 测试提供注解和断言。

words.example_sentence: A POM file describes a Maven project's dependencies and build settings.
words.example_sentence_cn: POM 文件描述 Maven 项目的依赖和构建配置。
